'''watopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:obduredness|obduredness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-t-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obduredness|obduredness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| watopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wætepeth|wætepeth]] || [[word:wætepej|wætepej]] || [[word:wætepesh|wætepesh]] || [[word:wætepe|wætepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:watotopoth|watotopoth]] || [[word:watotopoj|watotopoj]] || [[word:watotoposh|watotoposh]] || [[word:watotopo|watotopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:watopoth|watopoth]] || [[word:watopoj|watopoj]] || [[word:watoposh|watoposh]] || [[word:watopo|watopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:watofpofth|watofpofth]] || [[word:watofpofj|watofpofj]] || [[word:watofpofsh|watofpofsh]] || [[word:watofpof|watofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:watopotho|watopotho]] || [[word:watopojo|watopojo]] || [[word:watoposho|watoposho]] || [[word:watopoko|watopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:watopoth|watopoth]] || [[word:watopoj|watopoj]] || [[word:watoposh|watoposh]] || [[word:watopo|watopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:watopothol|watopothol]] || [[word:watopojol|watopojol]] || [[word:watoposhol|watoposhol]] || [[word:watopokol|watopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:watopoothotho|watopoothotho]] || [[word:watopoojojo|watopoojojo]] || [[word:watopooshosho|watopooshosho]] || [[word:watopooko|watopooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:watopothon|watopothon]] || [[word:watopojon|watopojon]] || [[word:watoposhon|watoposhon]] || [[word:watopokon|watopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:watopothooro|watopothooro]] || [[word:watopojooro|watopojooro]] || [[word:watoposhooro|watoposhooro]] || [[word:watopokooro|watopokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
